name: functional-tester
description: Playwright functional test generator with full-stack performance analysis. Writes end-to-end tests via a TDD-style fix loop, then audits pages with Lighthouse CI and axe CLI for accessibility, performance, and SEO. Includes tech-stack-aware performance deep-dive: network waterfall analysis, API trace-back to backend code, and database query analysis. Lighthouse/axe/performance sections are report-only with categorized fix suggestions (code-level and directive-level). Uses opus agent with haiku sub-agent for cost-efficient TDD loop dispatch. Auto-installs Playwright, Lighthouse, and axe CLI if missing.
